name: Core Development
description: Foundational improvements to the character's base nature and learned skills.

abilities.name: Improved Trait
abilities.description: Through intense physical conditioning or rigorous mental discipline, you have permanently enhanced your natural potential. Whether through heavy lifting, meditation, or scholarly study, your base capacity in the chosen trait increases by 1 point.

abilities.name: Improved Health
abilities.description: You have spent significant time building your endurance or mental fortitude, allowing you to withstand more punishment or psychological strain. Your maximum Physical or Mental Health increases by a D6 or 3 points (you choose).

abilities.name: Improved Skill
abilities.description: Through dedicated practice and repetition, you have reached a new tier of competence in your chosen field. Your proficiency in the selected Skill increases by a D6 or 3 points (you choose), reflecting your deepened understanding and muscle memory.

name: Combat Arts
description: Specialised techniques for physical and mental confrontation.

abilities.name: Ambidexterity
abilities.description: Years of training have eliminated your reliance on a dominant hand, allowing you to wield tools or weapons with equal grace in either hand. You no longer suffer from Disadvantage when performing actions with your off-hand.

abilities.name: Dual Wielder
abilities.description: You have mastered the complex coordination required to fight with a weapon in each hand, creating a whirlwind of strikes. When you take the Attack action with your dominant hand, you may immediately perform one additional attack with your off-hand weapon as part of the same action.

abilities.name: Quick Draw [Weapon Category]
abilities.description: You have practised the fluid motion of drawing your weapon until it is a reflex. You can draw a weapon of the selected category and prepare it for use as part of an Attack action, rather than spending a separate action. You can select this Ability multiple times, selecting another weapong category each time.

abilities.name: Quick Reload [Weapon Category]
abilities.description: You can manipulate magazines, bolts, or strings with mechanical precision even in the heat of battle. The number of Reload actions required to fully prepare the selected weapon category is reduced by 1. Reducing that amount to 0 implies that the weapon can be fully reloaded as part of the Attack combat action. You can select this Ability multiple times, selecting another weapong category each time.

abilities.name: Defensive Stance
abilities.description: While using the Defence combat action, your Physical Defence receives an additional +2 fixed bonus.

name: Tactical Prowess
description: Battlefield control, environmental exploitation, and heightened reactions.

abilities.name: Cover Specialist
abilities.description: You have an eye for the defensive geometry of your surroundings, instinctively tucking into corners and minimising your profile. Your Physical Defence increases by 1BD whenever you are behind at least Half Cover.

abilities.name: Suppressing Fire
abilities.description: You unleash a frightening volume of fire or aggressive strikes that force your opponent to seek cover rather than move. When you hit with an Attack action, you may choose to inflict the Restricted condition instead of dealing damage.

abilities.name: Combat Reflexes
abilities.description: You exist in a state of heightened readiness, your nerves twitching at the slightest hint of movement. This supernatural or highly-trained awareness grants you a permanent +5 bonus to your Reaction score.

name: Influence and Leadership
description: Social standing, reputation, and the ability to command or inspire others.

abilities.name: Network of Contacts
abilities.description: You have cultivated a web of informants, colleagues, or associates who provide you with valuable intelligence. Choose a specific field (such as Criminal, Corporate, or Academic); you gain Advantage on Investigation and Insight checks related to that field.

abilities.name: Commanding Presence
abilities.description: Your voice carries a weight of authority that can snap others out of shock or exhaustion. Once per encounter, you can use a Move action to shout orders or encouragement, removing the Surprised or Drained condition from an ally within 10 metres.

abilities.name: Words of Strength
abilities.description: You possess the empathy and charisma to remind your allies of their inner resolve when they are flagging. Once per short rest, you can speak a few restorative words to an ally, allowing them to recover 1 trait die from a Drained pool.

name: Technical Mastery
description: Interaction with complex machinery, digital interfaces, and academic knowledge.

abilities.name: Jury-rigger
abilities.description: You possess a brilliant, if messy, understanding of machinery, allowing you to bypass broken circuits or forge parts from scrap. You can perform temporary repairs on a device using 1 Use Item action; the device functions for a single encounter before failing completely.

abilities.name: Neural Interface
abilities.description: Whether through cybernetic implants or an intuitive mystical bond, your mind communicates directly with machine logic. You gain Advantage on all Use Skill checks involving Hacking, Piloting, or the Remote Operation of drones.

abilities.name: Hacker's Intuition
abilities.description: You perceive the flow of data as a natural landscape, spotting shortcuts and vulnerabilities that others miss. Your efficiency with digital systems is so great that the time required for technical tasks involving computers or electronics is halved.

name: Survival and Medicine
description: Stability in the field, emergency care, and environmental resilience.

abilities.name: First Aid
abilities.description: You are trained to keep your cool in medical emergencies, quickly staunching bleeding or stabilising trauma. Once per short rest, you can perform a First Aid action (Medicine vs Difficulty 10) to restore 1D10 points to a target's Physical Health.

abilities.name: Hardened Body
abilities.description: Your body has been forged by hardship, scarred by past battles, or chemically reinforced to withstand extreme trauma. This resilience grants you a permanent +10 bonus to your maximum Physical Health.
